skill.name: instagram-automation
skill.description: Automate Instagram posting, carousels, and analytics via Rube MCP with Composio Instagram toolkit
skill.summary: Create and publish Instagram posts, manage carousels, retrieve insights, and monitor publishing limits through Rube MCP integration
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: Static analyzer flagged 43 external_commands patterns and 1 network URL, but all are false positives. The skill contains only documentation (SKILL.md) with markdown-formatted tool names, not executable code. Network access via Rube MCP endpoint is legitimate for Instagram API operations. Requires user OAuth connection. No confirmed security threats found.

low_findings.title: External MCP Service Dependency
low_findings.description: Skill requires connection to external MCP server at rube.app for Instagram API access. Users must trust the third-party service with Instagram OAuth credentials.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Documentation explicitly requires adding https://rube.app/mcp as MCP server - clear external service dependency

content.value_statement: Managing Instagram content and tracking performance requires repetitive manual work. This skill automates posting, carousel creation, and insights retrieval through Rube MCP integration.
actual_capabilities: Create and publish single image or video posts to Instagram Business accounts
Build and publish carousel posts with 2-10 media items
Retrieve post-level and account-level analytics insights
Monitor publishing limits and quota availability
Fetch media comments and carousel child items
Check media container processing status before publishing
limitations: Requires Instagram Business or Creator account; personal accounts are not supported
Media URLs must be publicly accessible; private or authenticated URLs will fail
Limited to 25 posts per 24-hour rolling window enforced by Instagram
Insights data may have up to 48 hours delay from Instagram API

use_cases.title: Social Media Manager
use_cases.description: Schedule and publish daily content, create product showcase carousels, and track engagement metrics without manual Instagram app usage
use_cases.target_user: Social media managers handling multiple brand accounts

use_cases.title: Content Creator
use_cases.description: Automate posting workflow from content library, monitor post performance, and respond to engagement trends efficiently
use_cases.target_user: Independent creators and influencers managing their own accounts

use_cases.title: Marketing Analyst
use_cases.description: Extract post insights programmatically, compare performance across content types, and generate reports on engagement patterns
use_cases.target_user: Marketing teams analyzing social media ROI and content effectiveness

prompt_templates.title: Beginner: Post a Single Image
prompt_templates.prompt: Post this image to my Instagram with the caption 'Excited to share our latest update! #newproduct #launch'. Image URL: https://example.com/image.jpg

prompt_templates.title: Intermediate: Create a Product Carousel
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a carousel post showcasing our new collection. Use these 5 images in order: [URL1, URL2, URL3, URL4, URL5]. Caption: 'New arrivals are here! Swipe to see all styles. Shop now via link in bio. #newcollection #fashion'

prompt_templates.title: Advanced: Weekly Performance Report
prompt_templates.prompt: Get all my media from the past week and retrieve insights for each post. Include metrics for impressions, reach, engagement, and saves. Summarize which posts performed best and identify patterns in top-performing content.
prompt_templates.scenario: Analytics retrieval and analysis for performance review

prompt_templates.title: Expert: Bulk Posting with Limit Check
prompt_templates.prompt: Check my remaining publishing quota for the next 24 hours. If I have at least 3 posts available, publish these three product announcements in sequence with 30-minute intervals between each. Verify each post status before proceeding to the next.
prompt_templates.scenario: Multi-post workflow with quota validation and status polling

output_examples.input: Post a sunset photo with caption 'Golden hour magic'
output_examples.output: Media container created successfully. Container ID: 17841234567890. Post published to Instagram. Post URL: https://instagram.com/p/ABC123xyz/

output_examples.input: Show me insights for my top 3 posts this week

output_examples.output: You have 18 posts remaining in the current 24-hour window. Limit resets based on posting times, not calendar days.

best_practices: Always call RUBE_SEARCH_TOOLS first to get current tool schemas before executing workflows
Verify media container status is FINISHED before publishing, especially for video content
Check publishing limits before bulk operations to avoid hitting the 25-post daily quota
anti_patterns: Do not use private or authenticated media URLs; they must be publicly accessible
Avoid attempting to publish before container processing completes; poll status first
Do not exceed Instagram rate limits; implement exponential backoff for 429 responses

faq.question: What type of Instagram account do I need?
faq.answer: You need an Instagram Business or Creator account. Personal accounts cannot use the Instagram Graph API required for automation.

faq.question: How do I connect my Instagram account?
faq.answer: Use RUBE_MANAGE_CONNECTIONS with toolkit 'instagram'. If not connected, follow the OAuth link to authorize. Confirm status shows ACTIVE before running workflows.

faq.question: Why are my video posts failing?
faq.answer: Video containers require processing time. Always poll INSTAGRAM_GET_POST_STATUS until status is FINISHED before attempting to publish.

faq.question: Can I post to personal Instagram accounts?
faq.answer: No. The Instagram Graph API only supports Business and Creator accounts. Personal accounts must be converted to a Creator account (free) to use this skill.

faq.question: What happens if I exceed the posting limit?
faq.answer: Instagram enforces 25 posts per 24-hour rolling window. Exceeding this limit returns an error. Use INSTAGRAM_GET_IG_USER_CONTENT_PUBLISHING_LIMIT to check quota before bulk posting.

faq.question: Why are my insights showing old data?
faq.answer: Instagram API insights can have up to 48 hours delay. Recent posts may not show complete metrics immediately.
